title: Crispy Mediterranean Pork Knuckle Stir-fry
description: A comforting mediterranean dish featuring crispy pork knuckle with umami flavors and a touch of sweetness from roasted garlic and lemon.

ingredients.name: Pork Knuckle
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is kosher and cooked to an internal temperature of at least 145°F (63°C)

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Roast with the pork for added flavor

ingredients.name: Lemon
ingredients.notes: Juice and zest to add tanginess

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Optional for seasoning the pork, adjust based on preference

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: For adding a bit of spiciness and depth to the dish

instructions: Season the pork knuckle with salt, pepper, thyme, and olive oil. Place it in a roasting pan.
Roast the garlic cloves and lemon slices along with the pork for about 1 hour until fully cooked. Check internal temperature using a meat thermometer;
While waiting, slice the roasted garlic cloves and zest the lemon.
Heat some more olive oil in a wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add sliced onions (optional for color and sweetness) to sauté before adding the pork. Cook until golden brown on all sides.
Stir-fry with the chopped roasted garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and thyme if desired. Adjust seasoning based on taste.
Serve hot with any preferred side dishes like Greek salad or crusty bread.
